Open App
Free, Confidential Mental Health Support

Radio Check

24/7 peer support and counselling for UK Armed Forces personnel, veterans, and their families.
Because sometimes you just need to know someone's listening.

Open the AppLearn More

What is Radio Check?

Radio Check is a free, completely confidential mental health and peer support service built by veterans, for the UK Armed Forces community. Whether you're currently serving, a veteran, a reservist, or a family member - we're here for you, day or night.

No Names Required

Completely anonymous. No registration, no records, no impact on your service record or security clearance.

Available 24/7

Our AI Battle Buddies are always online. Human counsellors and peer supporters available during staffed hours.

Built By Veterans

Created by people who've served, who understand military culture, and who get it.

How Radio Check Helps

Whether you're struggling right now or just want someone to talk to, we offer multiple ways to get support.

AI Battle Buddies

9 AI companions with unique personalities, available 24/7 for a chat whenever you need it.

Live Chat Support

Text chat with real counsellors and peer supporters who understand military life.

Callback Service

Request a call from a counsellor at a time that suits you.

The Gym

Frankie's 12-week PTI fitness programme to build strength and mental resilience.

Self-Care Tools

Private journaling, breathing exercises, grounding techniques, and sleep tips.

Support Directory

Comprehensive database of UK veteran charities and military support services.

Meet the AI Team

9 unique AI Battle Buddies, each with their own personality and background. Available 24/7, they understand military culture and speak your language.

T

Tommy

Your Laid-Back Mate

Ex-Infantry, now your go-to for a relaxed chat. Tommy keeps it real with dry humor and zero judgment. Perfect for when you just need someone to listen without making a big deal of it.

Calmfriendlyrelatable
B

Bob

Straight-Talking Para

Former Parachute Regiment. Bob tells it like it is with Para banter and no-nonsense advice. When you need someone to cut through the BS and give you a reality check.

Directhonestmotivating
F

Frankie

PTI Fitness Coach

Your virtual PTI who combines physical training with mental resilience. Frankie runs The Gym - a 12-week programme that builds strength inside and out.

Energeticencouragingstructured
R

Rachel

Warm & Caring Support

Former Army medic with a gentle approach. Rachel specializes in emotional support and helping you process difficult feelings with compassion and understanding.

Empatheticpatientnurturing
R

Rita

Family Support Specialist

Dedicated to supporting military families. Rita helps partners, parents, and children of serving personnel and veterans navigate the unique challenges they face.

Understandingsupportiveresourceful
M

Mac

Royal Navy Veteran

Senior rate who served on submarines. Mac understands the unique pressures of naval service and the challenges of long deployments away from family.

Steadywiseexperienced
T

Taff

RAF Ground Crew

Former RAF technician who knows the importance of keeping things running smoothly. Taff is practical, solution-focused, and great at breaking down problems.

Analyticalpracticalreassuring
J

Jock

Scottish Highlander

Former Royal Regiment of Scotland. Jock brings highland hospitality and a warm Scottish welcome. Great for a blether when you need to get things off your chest.

Friendlyhumorouswelcoming
S

Sarge

Senior NCO Mentor

The wise senior NCO who has seen it all. Sarge provides mentorship, career guidance, and helps you navigate military bureaucracy and transition challenges.

Authoritativeknowledgeablementoring

Who Is Radio Check For?

Radio Check is for everyone in the UK Armed Forces community. No matter your rank, service, or situation.

Serving Personnel

Currently serving in the Regular Forces or Reserves? We're here for you. Completely confidential - no impact on your career.

Veterans

Whether you served 4 years or 24, left last month or decades ago - Radio Check supports you through transition and beyond.

Families

Partners, parents, children, and loved ones. Rita, our family support AI, specialises in helping those who support others.

Why "Radio Check"?

In military communications, a "Radio Check" is a simple request to confirm someone's listening - to know you're not alone on the net.

That's what this app is about. When you're struggling at 3am, when the thoughts won't stop, when you need to talk but don't know who to call - Radio Check is your confirmation that someone's listening. You're not broadcasting into the void.

"Radio Check" - because sometimes you just need to know someone's there.

24/7
AI Support Available

FREE
Forever
